mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO notification (user_id, actor_id, type, title, content, content_type, image_url, is_pinned, is_bold, is_read, entity_type, entity_id, broadcast_id, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.actorId}, #{item.type}, #{item.title}, #{item.content}, #{item.contentType}, #{item.imageUrl}, #{item.isPinned}, #{item.isBold}, #{item.isRead}, #{item.entityType}, #{item.entityId}, #{item.broadcastId}, NOW())
